title: Cranfillia pilosa
taxonomy: Cranfillia pilosa is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant is a part of the genus Cranfillia, which contains a limited number of species. The classification of Cranfillia pilosa places it within the order Asterales, a group of flowering plants that includes many species of daisies and sunflowers. Further, it belongs to the subclass Asteridae, which includes several families of flowering plants. The classification of Cranfillia pilosa is further refined by its placement within the superorder Asteranae.
